message:
test(render): add incremental layout engine integration test

Verifies that IncrementalLayoutEngine correctly handles a label-only
edit: renders two flowcharts differing only in one node label, asserts
both produce valid SVG, confirms the SVGs differ, and checks that the
incremental path recomputes at most all nodes (validating the cache/
incremental machinery is wired up).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
